# Project Publishing Template

Copy this file to `src/content/projects/your-project-slug.md` and replace all placeholder values.

Do not publish this template file directly.

---

```yaml
---
title: "Your Project Name"
description: "Short summary of the project for listing pages and SEO."
slug: your-project-slug
status: in-progress
featured: false
github: https://github.com/your-org/your-repo
demo: 
technologies:
  - Terraform
  - Python
  - Docker
difficulty: intermediate
startDate: 2026-01-01
updatedDate: 2026-01-15
tags:
  - infrastructure
  - automation
coverImage: /images/your-project-cover.png
---
```

## Overview

Describe the project goal, problem statement, and intended audience.

## Architecture

Document the design, components, data flow, and key decisions.

## Implementation

Walk through build steps, configuration, and deployment notes.

## Outcomes

Summarize results, metrics, lessons learned, and future work.

## Repository

Link to the GitHub repository and any related documentation.
